mechanic.name: Symphony: Sigh
mechanic.desc: The boss gains an Echo Codex that dissipates after taking a certain number of hits. When the boss casts certain skills, the Echo Codex casts similar skills.

mechanic.name: Symphony: Recitation
mechanic.desc: The boss gains a Record Codex that dissipates after taking a certain number of hits but revives after some time. When the boss casts certain skills, the Record Codex records similar skills and casts them later.

mechanic.name: Codex's Protection
mechanic.desc: The boss initially has high DMG Resistance. Each Echo Codex or Record Codex removed lowers the boss's DMG Resistance.

mechanic.name: Symphony: Fear Resonance
mechanic.desc: Each time a friendly unit deals DMG to the boss, increases the boss's DMG Taken for a short period.

mechanic.name: Requiem Aria
mechanic.desc: The boss summons multiple Echo Codices to continuously channel energy. The fewer Echo Codices remaining when the channeling ends, the weaker the attacks from the boss.

mechanic.name: Nightmare Finale
mechanic.desc: The boss summons the Record Codices on the battlefield and absorbs them. The more Record Codices absorbed, the stronger the boss's attacks will become.

mechanic.name: Waltz: Chorus
mechanic.desc: The boss gains an Echo Codex that takes much less Auto Attack DMG. When the boss casts certain skills, the Echo Codex casts similar skills.

mechanic.name: Waltz: Echo
mechanic.desc: The boss gains a Record Codex that takes much less Auto Attack DMG and revives after some time. When the boss casts certain skills, the Record Codex records similar skills and casts them later.

mechanic.name: Waltz: Malice Shroud
mechanic.desc: After a friendly unit deals damage to the boss a certain number of times, it increases the damage the boss takes for a short period.

mechanic.name: Codex's Protection
mechanic.desc: The boss initially has high DMG Resistance. Each Echo Codex or Record Codex removed lowers the boss's DMG Resistance.

mechanic.name: Requiem Aria
mechanic.desc: The boss summons multiple Echo Codices to continuously channel energy. The fewer Echo Codices remaining when the channeling ends, the weaker the attacks from the boss.

mechanic.name: Nightmare Finale
mechanic.desc: The boss summons the Record Codices on the battlefield and absorbs them. The more Record Codices absorbed, the stronger the boss's attacks will become.

mechanic.name: Lord's Law: Assimilation Decay
mechanic.desc: When a friendly unit is on red or green tiles, this unit's DMG to same-color bosses is greatly reduced.

mechanic.name: Lord's Law: Isomeric Amplification
mechanic.desc: When a friendly unit is on red or green tiles, this unit's DMG to opposite-color bosses is significantly increased.

mechanic.name: Dominion
mechanic.desc: Certain boss skills can change the color of specific tiles on the board.

mechanic.name: Apocalyptic Twilight
mechanic.desc: Upon the defeat of either boss, the battle permanently enters the second phase. Players will face the remaining boss alone on a newly manifested chessboard.

mechanic.name: Omen of Ruin
mechanic.desc: In the second phase, prioritize neutralizing the Flaming Lanterns. Their explosions will color massive tiles across the board.
